fullHistory.content: Give a brief, friendly welcome overview of what you can help with in this project. Use markdown with emoji section headers. Cover: Poses & Movement, Physics Simulation, Joint & Hand Control, and Code & Controls. Never use the word "Animations" — always say "Physics Simulation" instead. Keep it concise around 8–10 lines.

## 👋 Welcome to Your Roba Studio Project!

**🤸‍♀️ Poses & Movement**  
Create and edit robot poses, define joint ranges, and switch between saved configurations.

**⚙️ Physics Simulation**  
Set simulation options (gravity, timestep, solver), tune friction/contacts, and run stable dynamics.

**🤖 Joint & Hand Control**  
Add motors, position/velocity actuators, and sensors for precise joint and hand manipulation.

**💻 Code & Controls**  
Write JavaScript controllers, bind keyboard/gamepad inputs, and integrate custom algorithms.
